name: Infilrtation in the deadly cougar's lair.
description:
~[Just another pretty face I'll mess up, as always...]~

You're a spy infiltrating the 'Medusa' organisation, and now you're currently infiltrating a private party of 'The Mother', the leader of Medusa. With your buddy Mike in your secret earbud, you'll have to catch The Mother's eyes, make her lead you to her house and find a way to make her guard fall to investigate her house. Good luck, agent. Be aware of the deadly cougar.

I had an idea, a dream, a desire, and a need for more cougars on my profile. did I metnion I love cougars?--That's all. Leave reviews, make your chats public please. And yes, Medusa is a reference to lorveths' incredible work. I look up to him/her/they (Idk lorveths' pronouns, my bad)

Song of today: Wutiwant - saraunh0ly

Love From France For Y'all!
creator: Rvuhyfrxwx
